channel.title: Seattle Center Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Seattle Center Events

item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Armory

Seattle Center Festál presents Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival in partnership with Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival Committee (SCBJCF). The festival deepens the understanding and serves as a vehicle for sharing Japanese and Japanese American culture and heritage through hundreds of performing and martial arts, exhibits and demonstrations, hands on kids’ activities, culinary treats, and more!

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

Event details

item.title: Mary Jane
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

Poignantly humorous and deeply cathartic, this semi-autobiographical drama by Tony-nominated playwright Amy Herzog is a love letter to caregivers and support systems of all kinds.

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Kraken vs LA Kings
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena

The Seattle Kraken host the Los Angeles Kings at Climate Pledge Arena.

Event details

item.title: An Evening with Gabor Mate: The Myth of Normal
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Embark on a profound journey into the intricate landscapes of the human mind and soul with renowned physician, speaker, and bestselling author, Dr. Gabor Maté.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

Event details

item.title: Appropriate: Preview Performance
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

When the Lafayettes descend upon their late father’s crumbling plantation home for an estate sale, they unearth an appalling secret that pits them against one another.

Event details

item.title: Mary Jane
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

Poignantly humorous and deeply cathartic, this semi-autobiographical drama by Tony-nominated playwright Amy Herzog is a love letter to caregivers and support systems of all kinds.

item.title: Giselle
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

A mountain village in a lush forest becomes the backdrop to love, betrayal, and otherworldly specters in this compelling masterpiece.

Event details

item.description:

item.title: Gypsy: A Musical Fable
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Cornish Playhouse

Gypsy tells the story of ambitious showbiz mother Rose, who treks across the country with her daughters Baby June and Louise in search of success with their homespun vaudeville act.

Event details

Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 12 AM

item.title: POP Cats
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Seattle Center Exhibition Hall

POP Cats is a one-of-a-kind cat convention where the love of cats meets creativity, community, and fun.

Event details

item.title: International Children's Friendship Festival
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Fisher Pavilion

Recognized by Washington State officials, this exciting festival is FREE and open to all—don’t miss out on the FUN!

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

item.title: Artists at the Center: Union Cultural Center
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Armory

Journey that blends together Brfazilian traditions and Afro-Brazilian forms such as Samba, Orixas dance, Samba de roda and Capoeira Angola.

Event details

item.title: Billy Goats Gruff and Other Tales: Preview Performance
item.description:
Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

This imaginative retelling seamlessly interweaves three classic tales into a heartwarming adventure that celebrates friendship and courage.
